title: fix: yellow flash when dictating before models loaded
author: Pendentive

copilot.body_summary:
## Pull request overview

Adds immediate visual feedback (yellow double-flash) when the dictation hotkey is pressed while the transcription worker/models are not yet ready, improving UX during startup/loading.

**Changes:**
- Trigger `_yellow_flash()` before returning when `_start_dictation()` ignor
